target_firewall.ordering: locked target-free vacuum -> auxiliary link minimization -> J/Y/mixing construction -> separate future held-out scoring

derivation.link_interaction: V_link=-Re Tr(Sigma^dagger K), Sigma in U(3)

symmetry.G2_covariance: h, phi, and all frames transform simultaneously; after h=e7 the construction is residual-SU(3) covariant
symmetry.frame_gauge: Sigma->O_e^T Sigma O_nu under O(3)_Le x O(3)_Lnu
symmetry.shared_space: a full-rank Sigma is a bifundamental link and reduces the independent left basis redundancy to the linked diagonal subgroup

claim_boundary: This gate derives and verifies a target-free auxiliary link and faithful left-observable J3(C) embedding on the already-selected G2 vacua. J3(C) is an associative subalgebra of the complexified Albert algebra; this is not yet a full non-associative E6 matter embedding. The link is minimized conditionally on the pre-existing vacua and has not been included in a backreacted vacuum/Hessian solve. No PMNS or lepton-mass agreement is claimed until a separate held-out score is run.
